curation_notes: Primary locations derived from both advisory description (which explicitly names core/versioning/txVersionChecker.go:22 as root cause) and the patch diff. CheckTxVersion is where the nil dereference occurs; createTx is where the fix adds the first-layer nil RawData rejection. The third patched file (network/p2p/libp2p/netMessenger.go pubsubCallback) adds a defense-in-depth recover() but is not the vulnerability itself. Pre-assigned class null-deref confirmed: CWE-476 maps directly, the advisory explicitly describes a nil-pointer panic, and the patch adds nil guards.
